reviews.review_title: A little pay to win but still kinda fun
reviews.review_description:
I like this, it's very fun until The general admission came out, with general admission other players get a pay to win monster, which I hope future monsters don't need general admission.

What also sucks is, I can't do the nightmare run with other people, unless someone has general admission, and all the time I've played nightmare run it was fun...until I get killed by those freaky butt naked nee biters...also, why is Charlie from eyes: the horror game here, but high key idc I like trafic skul.

The game not having players does not make a game bad as well the mimic is worse then entity it’s just what your better and the game isn’t dead anymore ever since we updated (we need general admission for payed assets such as servers)
this game is so bad it's so hard to move when is the monster like why can't you just make it that you can move of your joystick and tutorials almost impossible

developer_response.body:
One of the core design choices in Nightmare Tag is that humans and monsters control very differently. Humans use precise joystick movement, while monsters are much faster but rely on unique motion-based movement mechanics that take a bit more practice to master.

That difference is what creates many of the close chases and near escapes that the game is built around. If monsters had the same precise movement as humans while keeping their speed, the game would be much harder to balance.

We've also continued updating and improving the game, so if it's been a while since you played, it may be worth giving it another try.

I love the game and I do admire it my only problem is the lack of players. I do hope that the player count grows. So I can be able to play this game more often considering I just bought general admission. Other than that I do think this game has very high potential and I love the PvE mode

I love this game i like to jumpscare

cant even have fun ever since you guys added mimic the game as been trash and every time i play the mimics just spam this game fell off

developer_response.body:
I get the frustration, but Mimic isn’t pay-to-win. The default monster (the Entity) is intentionally stronger and easier to play, which is why it’s the beginner monster. Players running Mimic usually just have more experience, which can make it feel pay-to-win.
We’re constantly tuning and tweaking balance, so if you have ideas or specific feedback, feel free to share here or in the Discord.

reviews.review_description: the game was fun until the player base left and then added the p2w mimic now its just a shell of what it once was dont play as its unbearably underwelming

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review and feedback! I do want to clear up one thing though, Mimic isn’t pay-to-win. The free default monster is intentionally stronger and easier to use, which is why it’s the starting option. Players that have the Mimic unlocked are usually more experienced. 
Player count has fluctuated, but the game is still in early access and actively evolving. Recent updates added solo and co-op PvE modes so enjoyment no longer depends on population.

reviews.review_description: I like the game it's really good but it's stupid you have to pay $10 just to get different characters like just make it 100k exp or smth

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!

I understand where you're coming from. The reason the extra characters aren't unlockable through XP alone is because Nightmare Tag is essentially a $10 game that also offers a free version.

Rather than charging everyone upfront, I decided to let anyone play indefinitely for free with the starter human and monster. That way friends can jump in together, new players can learn the game, and nobody has to spend money just to find out whether they like it.

General Admission is what unlocks the full game and all future characters. You still unlock the characters with XP, but the $10 purchase is what helps fund continued development of Nightmare Tag.

The alternative would have been making the entire game cost $10 upfront, which would make it harder for new players to try the game and would likely mean fewer players online overall, which is not good for a PVP game.

I know not everyone will agree with that approach, but my goal was to create a system that's fair to free players while still allowing the game to keep growing.

Thanks for giving Nightmare Tag a shot!

Barley anyone playing this game and so loud i literally put it lower than mid and they still hurt

developer_response.body:
You’re not wrong about the audio, loudness and comfort is valid feedback and something I’ve been actively improving.
This review was also before the latest update. The game now includes solo and co-op PvE modes, so player count isn’t required to enjoy it anymore. If you ever decide to check it out again, I’d be curious what you think now.

reviews.review_description: listen i like the game play but why are things don't make sense to me like what time i freaking try to start a monster it looks like it doesn't do anything and plus this game is dead

developer_response.body:
Not starting as the monster is likely due to the role balancing system. Matches won’t start with more monsters than humans, so some players are assigned human at the start.
The game is still early access and actively being developed. The recent update added solo/co-op modes that don’t rely on player count.

When I got the mimic this day i played a lot then no one was playing so your game servers suck

developer_response.body:
I get the frustration—finding matches can be tough right now since Nightmare Tag is still in early access and the player base is still growing. The servers themselves are working fine, but when the player count is low it can feel like something’s broken. It’s usually busier on weekends between 12–9 PM EST, so that’s a great time to hop in. I also recommend joining the Discord or inviting some friends if you're looking for a match. Thanks for playing, and I hope you’ll stick around as I continue to develop the game!
https://discord.com/invite/atjsstCDNU

reviews.review_title: I think you made you game two little sca
reviews.review_description: I passed out when playing this game

It's really good! However, the only issue I have is that the mimic can see you even if you are using the invisibility tape. I don't remember if it can see you even if you're standing still. Other than that, this game is pretty good!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the 5 stars! Really glad you’re enjoying the game. We’re still deep in development, and feedback like this helps a ton.

As for the invisibility tape—right now, both monsters can see it in seeker mode for balance reasons, but I’ve heard similar feedback before. It’s something I’m keeping an eye on and could tweak in the future. If you have more thoughts, I’d love to hear them! Feel free to join the Nightmare Tag Discord and share your feedback directly. Thanks again for playing!
https://discord.com/invite/atjsstCDNU

reviews.review_description: I started playing this game during 2023 with the winter update. Since then, it’s been one of my favorite games. It’s so unique and just fun to play with others. It’s just a perfect horror game overall and has the best dev. I still cant wait for the future of this game

The games fun, has unique mechanics, but playing as a human is unreasonably punishing. Mimics can see where you are even if you use the invisibility tape so there's zero chance of hiding, the base entity can one-shot you, and climbing is essentially useless. Especially with the mimic upgrade that lets you occasionally see where the person you disguise as is at.

And when you pair them both together, you gotta pray even the slightest sound or movement doesn't get you killed, especially when the teams are split 50/50. It should be at max 2-3 entities.

Can't recommend this game until nerfs are introduced, as its mostly monster-sided. Remove mimic or introduce nerfs.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the detailed feedback, I truly appreciate it! The game is designed to be monster-sided to make human victories feel especially rewarding, but I’m always looking for ways to refine the balance. And, there are plans for new features that help humans escape monsters.
I’d love to hear more of your thoughts in our Discord, where we’re constantly discussing balance changes and playtesting updates. The game is still evolving, and input from players like you helps shape its future. Thanks again for playing, and I hope you’ll check out future updates!
discord.com/invite/atjsstCDNU

reviews.review_title: This game is very, VERY creative!
reviews.review_description: I think this game has more artistic flair than most movies and actual artists I’ve seen. not much more I have to say, but I do have one question. I accidentally held down the handprint restore button on General Admission, and I can’t even seem to see where the Mimic option is in the monster selection room. Unless it only shows when you have enough xp to get it. If a dev could respond to this and let me know, I would be very grateful!!

developer_response.body:
Hey! thanks for the review!
Don't worry if you held the restore button down, it just checks your in app purchases. The Mimic should be blue and transparent when it is locked, to the right of the Entity. A pedestal will appear in front of you when you look at the mimic, use that to spend your XP and unlock the Mimic.
If you have any more questions or feedback, it is easier to reach me on the Nightmare Tag discord server: https://discord.com/invite/atjsstCDNU
Have fun in there!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts! The Mimic and other monsters in Nightmare Tag are indeed intended to be challenging to enhance the intensity and thrill of the game for human players. The game is designed to make human victories rare and rewarding, as teamwork, strategy, and skill are essential to survive the experience. There are different ways to counter each monster, and we'd love to help you discover these techniques. 

Your feedback is really valuable to us, and we’re constantly working on improving the balance and experience. We'd be thrilled if you could join our community on Discord to share more of your thoughts and connect with others who enjoy the game. Thanks again for playing!
Discord Link: https://discord.com/invite/atjsstCDNU
